summary: Media Display Fix testing complete. All features verified working: Gallery shows 30 videos with thumbnails, 'All (30)' filter shows actual count (not 0), Explore shows 24 stories with images, Landing page 'Stories you can continue' shows 10 cards with images. SafeImage component with retry mechanism is properly integrated across all media surfaces.
critical_code_review_comments: SafeImage component correctly implements retry mechanism with cache-bust on first load failure (lines 77-90)
Gallery.js uses SafeImage for video cards and leaderboard items - VERIFIED
ExplorePage.js uses SafeImage for explore cards - VERIFIED
Landing.js uses SafeImage for showcase cards - VERIFIED
Backend /api/pipeline/gallery returns 30 videos with thumbnail_url - VERIFIED
Backend /api/engagement/explore returns 30 stories with thumbnail_url - VERIFIED
Backend /api/public/trending-weekly returns items with thumbnail_url - VERIFIED
All thumbnail URLs are properly presigned R2 URLs with X-Amz-Signature - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Media display fix verified. SafeImage component with retry mechanism is working across Gallery, Explore, and Landing pages. All 30 stories have valid R2 thumbnail URLs. The 'All (0)' bug is fixed - now shows 'All (30)'. Previous iterations 344-348 all passed.

Feature_1_Gallery_Videos_With_Thumbnails.details: Gallery page shows 30 video cards with images loading via SafeImage

Feature_3_Gallery_Cards_SafeImage.details: Gallery cards use SafeImage component with gradient fallback

Feature_4_Gallery_Most_Remixed.details: Most Remixed Creations section shows 2 items with images

Feature_5_Explore_Stories_With_Thumbnail.details: Explore page shows 24 stories with thumbnail images

Feature_6_Explore_SafeImage.details: Explore cards use SafeImage with gradient fallback on error

Feature_7_Landing_Stories_Continue.details: Landing page 'Stories you can continue' shows 10 cards with images

Feature_8_SafeImage_Retry.details: SafeImage component has retry mechanism with cache-bust (lines 77-90)

Feature_9_Backend_Gallery.details: /api/pipeline/gallery returns videos array with thumbnail_url and output_url

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. No mocking.
